user_query: I want to explore the S&P 500 verticals and fetch the call and put spreads with the highest credits, additionally provide me with the verticals for Apple's stock.

TaskList.description: Fetch the call and put spreads data for S&P 500 with the highest credits.
Query the verticals for Apple's stock.
Combine the results from Subtask 1 and Subtask 2 to provide a comprehensive overview.
